auth.label: App ID
auth.description: Open Exchange Rates App ID sent with the app_id query parameter. Get it from your dashboard: https://openexchangerates.org/account/app-ids.

actions.name: convert_currency
actions.description: Convert an amount between two currencies using Open Exchange Rates.

from.description: Source currency code for the conversion.

to.description: Target currency code for the conversion.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for converting an amount between currencies with Open Exchange Rates.

disclaimer.description: Disclaimer text returned by Open Exchange Rates.

license.description: License URL returned by Open Exchange Rates.

from.description: Source currency code used for the conversion.

to.description: Target currency code used for the conversion.

request.description: Conversion request echoed by Open Exchange Rates.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp used for the conversion rate.

rate.description: Exchange rate used for the conversion.

meta.description: Conversion metadata returned by Open Exchange Rates.

response.description: Converted amount returned by Open Exchange Rates.

outputSchema.description: Currency conversion result returned by Open Exchange Rates.

actions.name: get_currencies
actions.description: Retrieve all currencies supported by Open Exchange Rates.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving supported Open Exchange Rates currencies.

outputSchema.description: Mapping of ISO currency codes to full currency names.

actions.name: get_historical_rates
actions.description: Retrieve historical Open Exchange Rates exchange rates for a specific date.

date.description: Historical date to request from Open Exchange Rates in YYYY-MM-DD format.

base.description: Three-letter base currency code for the returned rates.

symbols.description: List of target currency codes to include in the response.

showAlternative.description: Whether to include alternative, black-market, and digital currency rates.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching historical Open Exchange Rates exchange rates.

disclaimer.description: Disclaimer text returned by Open Exchange Rates.

license.description: License URL returned by Open Exchange Rates.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the rates snapshot was generated.

historical.description: Whether the returned rates represent a historical snapshot.

base.description: Base currency used for the returned rates.

rates.description: Mapping of currency codes to exchange rates for the selected base currency.

outputSchema.description: Open Exchange Rates historical exchange rate snapshot.

actions.name: get_latest_rates
actions.description: Retrieve the latest Open Exchange Rates exchange rates.

base.description: Three-letter base currency code for the returned rates.

symbols.description: List of target currency codes to include in the response.

showAlternative.description: Whether to include alternative, black-market, and digital currency rates.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching the latest Open Exchange Rates exchange rates.

disclaimer.description: Disclaimer text returned by Open Exchange Rates.

license.description: License URL returned by Open Exchange Rates.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the rates snapshot was generated.

base.description: Base currency used for the returned rates.

rates.description: Mapping of currency codes to exchange rates for the selected base currency.

outputSchema.description: Open Exchange Rates exchange rate snapshot.

actions.name: get_timeseries_rates
actions.description: Retrieve Open Exchange Rates exchange rates across a date range.

startDate.description: Start date of the time-series range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: End date of the time-series range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

base.description: Three-letter base currency code for the returned rates.

symbols.description: List of target currency codes to include in the response.

showAlternative.description: Whether to include alternative, black-market, and digital currency rates.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching Open Exchange Rates time-series exchange rates.

disclaimer.description: Disclaimer text returned by Open Exchange Rates.

license.description: License URL returned by Open Exchange Rates.

start_date.description: Start date of the returned time-series range.

end_date.description: End date of the returned time-series range.

base.description: Base currency used for the returned rates.

additionalProperties.description: Mapping of currency codes to exchange rates for one date.

rates.description: Mapping of YYYY-MM-DD dates to per-currency exchange rates.

outputSchema.description: Open Exchange Rates time-series exchange rates.
